title: Risk Management Bot with Claude to use on Schwab
author: scalperspecltr
selftext: I've always struggled with taking oversized positions or letting big losses run too long—whether I’m on Thinkorswim at Schwab or IBKR. I’ve now built a solution: I created a bot using Claude that enforces my risk management. The entries and trade ideas are still mine, but once a trade is on, the bot ensures discipline. If any trade hits a 1% loss, it stops me out. If I hit a 2% loss overall during the day, the bot liquidates positions and locks me out from further trading. Has anyone else implemented something like this for their own risk management? Let’s hear how you automate discipline! please let me know.

comments.author: No-Consequence-1779
comments.body: Yes. Are you hitting the dev api or controlling the web browser directly?
